name: Alert Commander
description: SelfCorrectingLoopAgent that synthesizes zone vulnerability data and shelter resources to generate prioritized action plans. Runs a self-correction loop that detects and fixes issues like capacity overflows, missing shelter assignments, and population mismatches.

skills.name: Generate Prioritized Action Plans
skills.description: Generates prioritized evacuation and shelter-in-place action plans by matching high-risk zones to available shelters. Plans are sorted by priority (1=critical) and include population counts, shelter assignments, and evacuation routes.
examples: Generate evacuation plans for Tampa Bay zones
Which zones need immediate evacuation orders?
Create shelter assignment plans for 58,000 at-risk residents

skills.name: Self-Correct Action Plans
skills.description: Validates generated plans against constraints: shelter capacity limits, population-to-shelter ratios, and missing assignments. Applies corrections when issues are detected and records correction details for transparency.
examples: Verify shelter capacity is not exceeded
Check that all high-risk zones have shelter assignments

skills.name: Issue Final Emergency Command
skills.description: Emits the final COMMAND message to Emergency Management with the complete action plan set, threat level, and self-correction status. This is the terminal output of the 4-agent pipeline.
examples: Issue evacuation orders for critical zones
Send final action plans to emergency management

loop_config.correction_label: Applied to affected plans only — correction details logged

sends.description: Final prioritized action plans with self-correction status and threat level

receives.description: Zone risk scores, high-risk zones, and total population at risk
Shelter availability, capacity, and occupancy data
